component.name: Omni Clicker
component.summary: Native Linux autoclicker for X11 and Wayland-aware sessions

description.p: OmniClicker is a native Linux autoclicker designed to work out of the box on both X11 and modern Wayland desktops.

Unlike many Linux autoclickers, OmniClicker automatically selects the best backend for your desktop environment, providing native support for X11, KDE Plasma, GNOME, Sway, and Hyprland with little or no manual configuration.

It features configurable click intervals with optional randomization, left, right, middle, and custom key support, global hotkeys, background operation, and a clean Qt6 interface built specifically for Linux.

ul.li: Added support for custom key injection.
Added Hyprland native IPC global shortcuts support.
